top_signals.title: Procureship celebrates 10 years of innovation and global expansion
top_signals.summary: Procureship is proudly celebrating its 10-year anniversary as the maritime industry’s leading e-procurement platform as it continues to welcome a growing number of ship owners, operators and managers from around the world. Launched in Athens in 2016 by Grigoris Lamprou and Aris Manassakis, the two founders brought their respective expertise in shipping operations and financial ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: China's Rare Earth Grip Holds Despite Trump-Xi Talks
top_signals.summary: Donald Trump returned from Beijing calling his two-day summit with Xi Jinping a "success,” but the rare earth market is less convinced.  Despite closely watched talks on May 14-15, no formal agreement emerged on China's export controls, and shipments of the critical heavy minerals that power everything from F-35 fighters to electric vehicles remain well below historical levels. That is the assessment from BMI, the Fitch Group research unit, which said China's stranglehold on global rare earth supply is expected to "stay firmly in place"…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tanker reports explosion off Oman coast, crew safe
top_signals.summary: A tanker experienced an external explosion on its port side near the waterline approximately 60 nautical miles from Muscat, Oman’s capital, according to the United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations on Tuesday. The vessel and crew remained safe following the incident, UKMTO reported. The tanker’s master indicated that some bunker fuel was released into the sea ...

top_signals.title: NYK to Issue the Sixth Transition Bonds Promoting Decarbonization Projects, Including LNG-Fueled Vessels
top_signals.summary: NYK plans to issue transition bonds in mid-June 2026, with detailed issuance conditions to be announced at a later date. This marks NYK’s sixth issuance of such bonds. Transition bonds are designed to facilitate the transition to a low-carbon society. The funds raised will be allocated to projects aligned with our medium-term management plan, Sail ...

top_signals.title: The Nautical Institute launches new Engineering and Bunkering Assessors course to strengthen operational competency assessment
top_signals.summary: The Nautical Institute Academy has launched a new Engineering and Bunkering Assessors course designed to help maritime professionals carry out more effective assessments within high-risk shipboard operations. Developed by industry experts following a successful pilot phase, the course responds to growing industry demand for assessors who can evaluate not only technical compliance, but also behavioural ...

top_signals.title: Skyzone deal marks entry into Pakistan market
top_signals.summary: Sulnox, the greentech company delivering lower fuel costs and emissions with zero capex, is pleased to announce a distribution agreement with Skyzone Technologies Pvt Ltd (“Skyzone”), a Pakistan-based energy and industrial solutions provider with operations spanning chemicals, diesel genset systems and solar-based energy microgrids. The agreement represents a further strategic expansion of Sulnox’s land-based distribution ...
